channel.title: Yorkshire Experiences Events
channel.description: Upcoming Yorkshire events in the Experiences category.

item.title: Outdoor Yoga at Potteric Carr Nature Reserve
item.description: Join us at Potteric Carr throughout the beautiful summer months for relaxing morning yoga sessions with Boho Warrior Yoga.
item.location: Potteric Carr nature reserve , Mallard Way (nr junction 3 M18, south edge of Doncaster), Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN4 8DB
item.ify:location: Potteric Carr nature reserve , Mallard Way (nr junction 3 M18, south edge of Doncaster), Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN4 8DB
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Scarborough 400 - Maritime Heritage Centre
item.description: A special exhibition explaining the past 400 years of Scarborough Spa and the town.
item.location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.ify:location: Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, Scarborough Maritime Heritage Centre, 45 Eastborough, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Tower of Now
item.description: See the Tower of Now, Saad Qureshi’s 15-metre sculpture at Hall Ings, Bradford, celebrating the city’s diversity and cultural heritage.
item.location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.ify:location: Hall Ings, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD1 5SD
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Scarborough North (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Scarborough North beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.location: Scarborough North Bay, Scarborough North Bay, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO12 7TN
item.ify:location: Scarborough North Bay, Scarborough North Bay, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO12 7TN
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Filey South (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Filey South beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.location: Filey Beach, Filey Beach, Filey, East Riding of Yorkshire, YO14 9JZ
item.ify:location: Filey Beach, Filey Beach, Filey, East Riding of Yorkshire, YO14 9JZ
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Scarborough South (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Scarborough South beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.location: Scarborough South Bay, Scarborough South Bay, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.ify:location: Scarborough South Bay, Scarborough South Bay, Scarborough, North Yorkshire, YO11 1PB
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Nature Trail – Sat 28 Mar 2026
item.description: Dates: Saturday 28 March 2026–Sunday 6 September 2026, 10:00 am-5:00 pm Venue: York Museum Gardens

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Fraisthorpe (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give Fraisthorpe beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.location: Fraisthorpe Beach, at the beach entrance of Fraisthorpe Beach Car Park, Yo15 3qu

item.title: Made by Many Hands: A Heritage Craft exhibition
item.description: At Bradford Industrial Museum, Made by Many Hands highlights local craft traditions inspired by the Heritage Crafts list and is accompanied by workshops and events across the site.
item.location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.ify:location: Bradford Industrial Museum, Moorside Road, Eccleshill, Bradford, West Yorkshire, BD2 3HP
item.dc:creator: Visit Bradford

item.title: Waves of Waste beach clean at Flamborough (Multiple Dates)
item.description: Join our Waves of Waste co-ordinators as they give South Landing beach a thorough tidy up to protect marine wildlife.
item.location: Living Seas Centre, South Sea Road, Flamborough, Bridlington, YO15 1AE, Flamborough, East Riding of Yorkshire, YO15 1AE

item.title: Heritage
item.description: We’ve put together a busy schedule of events for all ages, covering arts and culture, live events in Doncaster, sport, shopping, eating, and drinking.
item.location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL
item.ify:location: coming back for more. Doncaster really does have it all! Tourist Information Centre 1 Priory Place Doncaster DN1 1BL

item.title: Peasholm Park Naval Warfare - Battle of Peasholm
item.description: Set on the Peashom Park lake in beautiful garden surroundings. War breaks out on the lake in the middle of the park when the 20-foot replica boats…
item.location: Peasholm Park, Peasholm Park, North Bay, Scarborough, YO12 7TR

item.title: The Watchers of York: Sculpture Trail
item.dc:creator: Visit York

item.title: Woldies Summer Days & Wild Superhero Mission
item.description: Explore North Yorkshire where adventure meets relaxation. From coast to countryside, uncover history, beauty and charm in England’s largest county.
item.location: Woldies, Sandy Lane, Wintringham, Malton, North Yorkshire, YO17 8HW
item.ify:location: Woldies, Sandy Lane, Wintringham, Malton, North Yorkshire, YO17 8HW
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Scarborough 400 giant deckchair trail
item.description: Take a seat back in time and discover the history of Britain’s original seaside resort as we celebrate 400 years since the discovery of Scarborough’s spa…
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Busy Bee Trail
item.description: Buzzzz, do you hear that? The bees are out collecting nectar to make honey. Follow the trail around Staveley and become a bee for the day.
item.location: Staveley Nature Reserve , Minskip Road, Boroughbridge, HG5 9LQ
item.ify:location: Staveley Nature Reserve , Minskip Road, Boroughbridge, HG5 9LQ
item.dc:creator: Yorkshire Wildlife Trust

item.title: Summer Holidays - Ampleforth Adventures
item.description: join us this summer to reconnect with nature and enjoy the simple things in life - fresh air and room to play.
item.location: Ampleforth Abbey, Ampleforth Abbey, York, YO62 4EN, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom

item.title: Wildlife Photography for Beginners at Staveley Nature Reserve
item.description: Join our resident photographer for a wildlife photography for beginners workshop.
item.location: Staveley nature reserve, Staveley nature reserve, Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, HG5 9LQ
item.ify:location: Staveley nature reserve, Staveley nature reserve, Boroughbridge, North Yorkshire, HG5 9LQ

item.title: Stockeld Summer
item.description: Join us from 18th July until 6th September for a festival-themed summer - see live performers every day, including music acts, magicians and more! Plus, epic family outdoor activities to make this your best summer day out yet!
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: Header Menu
item.description: We hold various fun and educational events every school holiday ! Whether you enjoy getting hands-on with science or listening to fascinating ocean talks, there's always something new to learn with every visit and for all ages.
item.dc:creator: The Deep

item.title: Special Guests: Nadine Matheson & Steve Cavanagh - Old Swan Hotel
item.description: No one is above the law. And no one is below it. In the ever-twisting world of crime fiction however, people can be above, below and beyond the law, often…
item.location: The Old Swan Hotel, Old Swan Hotel, Swan Road, Harrogate, HG1 2SR
item.ify:location: The Old Swan Hotel, Old Swan Hotel, Swan Road, Harrogate, HG1 2SR
item.dc:creator: Visit North Yorkshire

item.title: Grow with Pride
item.description: Celebrate Pride with a fun, nature-inspired drop-in activity at Gibson Mill.
item.location: Hardcastle Crags, Hebden Bridge, West Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Hardcastle Crags, Hebden Bridge, West Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play at Wentworth Castle Gardens
item.description: Summer of Play is back! Join us for another adventure-filled summer, every day throughout the holidays. With a fairytale castle, secret gardens and plenty of space to explore, Wentworth Castle Gardens is the perfect setting for your Summer of Play.
item.location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer of Play: Family trail
item.description: Let Dart the Dragonfly lead your adventures in the gardens at Beningbrough this summer.
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Orienteering at Wentworth Castle Gardens
item.description: We've teamed up with South Yorkshire Orienteers so you can give orienteering a go any day of the year at Wentworth Castle Gardens.
item.location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.ify:location: Wentworth Castle Gardens, Barnsley, South Yorkshire
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Geology tour
item.description: Join one of our volunteer guides on this 90-minute walk to learn how Brimham Rocks came to be.
item.dc:creator: National Trust Yorkshire

item.title: Summer River Workshops at Rowntree Park
item.description: Join sculptor and ceramicist Sarah Schiewe for a creative, family-friendly clay workshop inspired by York’s rivers, flooding history, and climate resilience. In this hands-on workshop, participants will create their own unique air-dry clay fish — a “river messenger” carrying stories, memories, and imagined journeys fro
item.location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU
item.ify:location: Rowntree Park, Rowntree Park Lodge, Richardson St, York YO23 1JU
item.dc:creator: Little Vikings

item.title: Tom Jones
item.description: Tom Jones + STONE FOUNDATION Music icon Tom Jones has announced his return to Halifax this summer for a huge outdoor headline show as part of his 2026 Come Gather Round tour. The legendary Welsh singer will take to the stage at TK Maxx Presents Live at The Piece Hall on Saturday 25 July. He... \n
item.location: The Piece Hall, The Piece Hall, Blackledge, Halifax HX1 1RE, Halifax, HX1 1RE

item.title: Fireman Sam: The Lost Pirate Treasure

item.title: Upcycling Clothes with Dye
item.description: Bring an old T-shirt to Bradford Industrial Museum and transform it into a unique fashion statement in this fun family upcycling workshop inspired by the exhibition Made by Many Hands.

Fresh from the release of their acclaimed sixth studio album Oh! The Ocean, and a huge headline tour that’s seen them play arenas across the globe – th

item.title: Halloween at Stockeld Park
item.description: Celebrate spooky season at Stockeld Park! With Woodland Witches, a home-grown Pumpkin Patch, magical forest trail, Zombie Laser, and the monster Maze, you're in for a day of skele-fun this Halloween!
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: The Christmas Adventure
item.description: Explore North Pole Street and hop in the Enchanted Elevator to meet Santa in our immersive Grotto, take a spin on our Ice Rink, explore the Enchanted Forest, playgrounds, maze, and illuminations, and more this Christmas at Stockeld!
item.dc:creator: Stockeld Park

item.title: Betfred 250th St Leger Festival | St Leger Day
item.description: The most historic race. The most historic party. Celebrating 250 Years of the World's Oldest Classic 2026 marks a huge milestone in British racing history, the 250th anniversary of the first running of the Betfred St Leger Stakes, which first took place all the way back in 1776. Capital Breakfast host DJ Jordan North w
item.location: Doncaster Racecourse, The Grandstand Leger Way, Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN2 6BB
item.ify:location: Doncaster Racecourse, The Grandstand Leger Way, Doncaster, South Yorkshire, DN2 6BB
item.dc:creator: Visit Doncaster
